<Meta title="Templates/Overview" />

# Templates

Phase 4 of the design system — 13 page-level layouts composed from the
[Patterns](?path=/docs/patterns-overview--docs) library, complete and verified (typecheck,
lint, tests, Storybook build all green).

Homepage, Category Landing, Article, Opinion, Live Blog, Features, Author Profile, Search
Results, Newsletter Landing, Video, Podcast, Archive, Error Pages.

Templates are structure-only and content-agnostic: their own props are named `ReactNode`
slots (e.g. `hero`, `body`, `sidebar`), not content data — a template never decides what
pattern fills a slot or what data it shows. The one fixed piece every template owns directly is
the site chrome (`GlobalHeader`/`Footer`, composed via `header`/`footer` prop bags), since every
real page needs it. Each template's own docs page (in the sidebar below) covers its slot
contract and composition rationale — see `CONTRIBUTING.md` at the project root for the full
convention.

This completes all four phases from the original project brief:

```
Design Tokens → Foundations → Components → Patterns → Templates
     (6 docs)     (8 docs)    (31, done)   (34, done)  (13, done)
```
